name: street-office-appointment
description: 街道办群众办事预约系统

scripts.db:init: node -e "const { initDatabase } = require('./db'); const db = initDatabase({ seed: false }); db.close(); console.log('数据库初始化完成')"
scripts.db:seed: node -e "const { initDatabase } = require('./db'); const db = initDatabase(); db.close(); console.log('数据库初始化并填充默认数据完成')"
scripts.db:reset: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const { initDatabase, getDbPath } = require('./db'); const dbPath = getDbPath(); if (fs.existsSync(dbPath)) { fs.unlinkSync(dbPath); console.log('已删除旧数据库:', dbPath); } const db = initDatabase(); db.close(); console.log('数据库重置完成')"
scripts.healthcheck: node -e "const http = require('http'); const port = process.env.PORT || 3000; http.get('http://localhost:' + port + '/api/health', (res) => { let d=''; res.on('data',c=>d+=c); res.on('end',()=>{ console.log(d); process.exit(res.statusCode===200?0:1); }); }).on('error',(e)=>{ console.error('健康检查失败:',e.message); process.exit(1); })"
